calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Vacate Arbitrator Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Referral To The Cal. Superior Court In Santa Clara County Per The Terms Of The Contested Contract
Off Calendar Apr-20-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SUSAN T. YE OF HINSHAW & CULBERTSON LLP, TEL. NO. 362-6000 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
TODD S. GLASSEY, TEL. NO. (408)890-7321, RESPONDENT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. RESPONDENT TODD GLASSEY's Motion To Vacate Arbitrator Award Of Attorney's Fees And Referral To The Cal. Superior Court In Santa Clara County Per The Terms Of The Contested Contract is Denied. Judgment was entered in this matter in May 2005. The judgment has not been vacated, and therefore, the Court does not have jurisdiction to rule on this motion. Additionally, CCP sec. 1288 provides that a petition to vacate an arbitration award must be served and filed no later than 100 days after the date of the service of a signed copy of the award. The award was served on Respondent on December 2, 2004, and therefore the 100 day time period to file a petition to vacate has expired. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR # 12913 =302/ehg

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Vacate Arbitrator Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Referral To The Cal. Superior Court In Santa Clara County Per The Terms Of The Contested Contract

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
RESPONDENT TODD GLASSEY'S Motion To Vacate Arbitrator Award Of Attorney's Fees And Referral To The Cal. Superior Court In Santa Clara County Per The Terms Of The Contested Contract - The motion is continued to April 20, 2015 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with SF Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of its moving papers with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge : Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/ehg

Off Calendar May-11-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: SALLE E. YOO, ESQ. OF DAVIS WRIGHT TREMAINE LLP, (415) 276-6564, FOR PETITIONER/MOVING PARTY, AMANO CORPORATION
DENNIS L. KENNELLY, ESQ., (650) 853-1291, FOR RESPONDENT/OPPOSING PARTY, TODD S. GLASSEY

RULING:
MATTER ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PETITIONER AMANO CORPORTION'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award As Judgment And To Award CCP 1293.2 Fees And Costs IS GRANTED. FEES AND COSTS AS FOLLOWS: $5,445 IN FEES, $295.50 IN COSTS, TOTAL: $5,740.50. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR#1558

Notice Of Hearing Petition And Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award As Judgment And To Award Ccp 1293.2 Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Apr-18-2005 Continued To May-11-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Salle Yoo, Esq. of Davis Wright Tremaine, 415-276-6564 for petitioner and moving party Amano Corporation. Dennis Kennelly, Esq., 650-853-1291 for respondent and opposing party Todd Glassey.

RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court changed its Tentative Ruling:
A supplemental proof of service was submitted in open court by the petitioner. Respondent was served as of today. PETITIONER AMANO CORPORTION's Notice Of Hearing Petition And Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award As Judgment And To Award Ccp 1293.2 Fees And Costs is continued to 5/11/05. Matter will be heard on the papers already submitted. (301/KMCCA) Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR: 6840
